transcript: Speaker A: Hello Puja, nee English samsarichu nammude clients-nte mood aake poyi. [Hello Puja, you spoke English and completely ruined our clients' mood.] Speaker B: Athentha sir? [Why is that, sir?] Speaker A: Nee English-il thappi thappi samsarichu avarkku product polum manasilayilla. [You stumbled so much in English that they didn't even understand the product.] Speaker B: I try sir, I try. Chettayi enne 20 minute-il office-il onnu ethikki please. [I try sir, I try. Brother, please get me to the office in 20 minutes.] Speaker C: Ma'am, it's showing around 40 minutes on the map. The traffic is quite heavy today. Speaker B: Kollalo chetta, ningal driver alle, ennitt ithra nalla English engane samsarikkunnu? [Great, brother! You are a driver, yet how do you speak such good English?] Speaker C: Madam, English padikkan easy aanu, ningalkku oru phone mathi. [Madam, learning English is easy, you just need a phone.] Speaker B: Phone-ilo? Enikku manasilayilla, ath engane? [On a phone? I don't understand, how?] Speaker C: Nooku, ente phone-il SpeakX app und. Ithu oru AI English teaching app aanu. Ithu use cheythal ningalkku eppam venamengilum English samsarichu padikkan pattum. Office-il, friends-inodu, allenkil manager-odu engane samsarikanam, restaurant-il engane order cheyyam. So ithinakath basics thottu daily life situations vare namukku padippichu tharum. Ithinakath divasavum namukku 10-15 minute vare teacher-ude aduth samsarichu kondu English padikkam. Enne nooku, part-time job cheythukondu thanne ente English kondu mathram enikku office-il joli kitti. Athukondu ini naanaked vicharikenda aavashyamilla. 15 divasam kondu namukku SpeakX app use cheythukondu English nannayi samsarikan pattum. [Look, I have the SpeakX app on my phone. This is an AI English teaching app. Using this, you can practice speaking English anytime. How to speak in the office, with friends, or with a manager, how to order in a restaurant. So, it teaches us everything from basics to daily life situations. In this, we can practice speaking with a teacher for 10-15 minutes daily to learn English. Look at me, while doing a part-time job, I got an office job solely because of my English. So, there's no need to feel embarrassed anymore. In 15 days, we can speak English well using the SpeakX app.] Speaker B: Sheri, enna njan ippo thanne SpeakX app download cheyyam. [Okay, then I will download the SpeakX app right now.]

Kollalo chetta, ningal driver alle, ennitt ithra nalla English samsarikkunnu? English padikkan easy aanu, ningalkku oru phone mathi. Phone-ilo? Enikku manasilayilla, ath engane? SpeakX teaching app aanu. Ithu use cheythal eppam venamengilum English samsarichu Office-il samsarikanam, restaurant-il So ithil basics-otu situations ithil divasam 10-15 minute samsarichu English padikyam. part-time kond mathram enikku Athukondu ini 15 divasathil SpeakX app English Sheri, enna njan ippo thanne SpeakX app
summary: A woman gets scolded by her boss over the phone for her poor English skills, which ruined a client meeting. Her bike taxi driver, speaking fluent English, recommends the SpeakX AI learning app to help her practice daily situations. The woman is convinced and decides to download the app immediately.
